content:
Hi Chan — quick answer:

- **Most expensive by current market value:** **PROP-0001 — Land near river** (123 Riverside Road) — **$1.45M** (latest valuation: May 2026). [View Property](/property/PROP-0001)

If you meant **by purchase price**, the highest is **PROP-0011 — BKK1 Prime Land** (purchase price **$1.45M**). Note: PROP-0011 currently has no market valuation in the system. [View Property](/property/PROP-0011)

How would you like me to proceed — rank the rest of the portfolio by market value or by purchase price?
